mapper.sql: id, community_id, house_no, owner_id, car_plate_id, car_number, apply_reason, status, reject_reason, audit_admin_id, audit_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted, deleted_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visitor_application (community_id, house_no, owner_id, car_plate_id, car_number, apply_reason, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{houseNo}, #{ownerId}, #{carPlateId}, #{carNumber}, #{applyReason}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visitor_application WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM visitor_application WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, audit_admin_id = #{auditAdminId}, audit_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
